summary: Complete testing of sold_by_name and sold_by_user_id feature for tracking which salesperson sold a vehicle. All backend tests passed (8/8). Frontend UI tests confirmed sold_by_name display on VehicleCard, VehicleDetailModal, and ReportModal 'Satış Elemanı' column.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) on initial render - cosmetic only
React console warnings: '<span> cannot be a child of <select/option/tr>' - caused by visual editor wrapper, functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Backend: PATCH /api/cars/{id} with status='Satıldı' auto-populates sold_by_user_id from current user - PASSED
Backend: PATCH /api/cars/{id} with status='Satıldı' auto-populates sold_by_name from user.company_name - PASSED
Backend: Satis user selling car records their company_name as sold_by_name - PASSED
Backend: Cancel sale (status reverts from Satıldı to Stokta) clears sold_by_user_id - PASSED
Backend: Cancel sale (status reverts from Satıldı to Stokta) clears sold_by_name - PASSED
Backend: Status change FROM Satıldı TO Kapora Alındı auto-clears sold_by fields - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/cars returns sold_by_name and sold_by_user_id fields - PASSED
UI: Navigate to Satılan Araçlar view - PASSED
UI: VehicleCard shows 'Satan: [company_name]' for sold vehicles - PASSED (data-testid='sold-by-info-{car.id}')
UI: VehicleDetailModal shows 'Satan Kişi: [company_name]' row for sold vehicles - PASSED
UI: ReportModal 'Satış Raporu' (sold type) shows 'Satış Elemanı' column header - PASSED
UI: 'Satışı İptal Et' option visible in menu for sold vehicles (data-testid='cancel-sale-{car.id}') - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Backend implementation (server.py lines 491-501) correctly handles auto-population and clearing of sold_by fields
Frontend VehicleCard.jsx (lines 218-230) properly renders sold_by_name with data-testid attribute
VehicleDetailModal.jsx (line 115) shows 'Satan Kişi' info row with User icon
ReportModal.jsx conditionally renders 'Satış Elemanı' column only for reportType='sold' (lines 454 and 468)
App.js handleCancelSale (lines 313-317) properly clears sold_by_user_id and sold_by_name when sale is cancelled

seed_data_used.cars_tested: TEST_Audi A6 (created and sold during test), Mercedes C200, BMW 320i (with deposit)
seed_data_used.sale_flow: Created car -> sold as admin -> verified sold_by_name='Test Galeri' -> visible on card/modal/report

context_for_next_testing_agent: Sold_by feature fully working. When a car is sold via PATCH /api/cars/{id} with status='Satıldı', backend auto-populates sold_by_user_id and sold_by_name from current user. VehicleCard shows 'Satan: [name]' at bottom of sold vehicle cards using data-testid='sold-by-info-{car.id}'. VehicleDetailModal shows 'Satan Kişi' row. ReportModal shows 'Satış Elemanı' column only when reportType='sold'. Cancel sale from frontend (handleCancelSale in App.js) clears sold_by fields. Backend also auto-clears sold_by when status changes FROM 'Satıldı' to any other status.

mocked_apis.Email verification: MOCKED - verification code displayed on screen

features_verified.backend_sold_by_auto_population: WORKING - PATCH with status='Satıldı' populates sold_by_user_id and sold_by_name
features_verified.backend_sold_by_clearing: WORKING - Status change FROM 'Satıldı' clears sold_by fields
features_verified.frontend_vehicle_card_sold_by: WORKING - VehicleCard shows 'Satan: [name]' for sold vehicles
features_verified.frontend_detail_modal_sold_by: WORKING - VehicleDetailModal shows 'Satan Kişi' info row
features_verified.frontend_report_satis_elemani_column: WORKING - ReportModal shows 'Satış Elemanı' column for sold report type
features_verified.frontend_cancel_sale_clears_sold_by: WORKING - handleCancelSale clears sold_by_user_id and sold_by_name in patch
